heading: Warrants
label: 3323 Warrants
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3323(a)31:44(1st sentence).(1st par. 1st sentence), .June 10, 1921, ch. 18, § 30442 Stat. 2431:76(2d sentence words before 3d comma).(2d, 3d sentences), .July 31, 1894, ch. 174, § 1128 Stat. 20931:147(related to disbursement).R.S. § 305(related to disbursement); (last sentence related to § 305), .July 31, 1894, ch. 174, § 1128 Stat. 2093323(b)31:76(2d sentence words after 3d comma).3323(c)31:76(3d sentence).3323(d)31:44(1st sentence).31:77.R.S. § 3675.In the section, the words “Comptroller General” are substituted for “General Accounting Office” for consistency.Subsection (a) is substituted for 31:76(2d sentence words before 3d comma) and 147(related to disbursement) to eliminate unnecessary words and for clarity and consistency.In subsection (b), the word “Secretary” is substituted for “Treasurer” because of the source provisions restated in section 321 of the revised title.In subsection (b)(1), the words “instead of being specified on the warrant” are omitted as surplus. The reference to “” is used because section 72, referred to in 31:76, has been omitted from the restatement superseded by 31:82i and 31:82i is restated in section 3526.section 3526 of this titleIn subsection (c), the word “depositing” is substituted for “covering” for clarity and consistency.

The reference to “” is used because section 72, referred to in 31:76, has been omitted from the restatement superseded by 31:82i and 31:82i is restated in section 3526.section 3526 of this titleIn subsection (c), the word “depositing” is substituted for “covering” for clarity and consistency.

children.text: A disbursing official shall send to the Secretary with a warrant a certificate under , or a requisition for an advance. The certificate or requisition shall state the appropriation to which the payment is to be charged.section 3526 of this title
The Secretary shall return the certificate or requisition to the Comptroller General with the date and amount endorsed on the certificate or requisition.

children.label: c
children.text: A requisition for the payment of money on an audited account or for depositing money in the Treasury is not required.

children.label: d
children.text: The Secretary and the Comptroller General shall charge to the appropriate appropriation in their books any money paid by a warrant.
